description:
A vector database component for Elasticsearch, enabling efficient storage and 
retrieval of vector embeddings. It supports similarity search, filtering, 
and management of vector data with high performance. Supports Elastic Cloud 
Serverless, Elastic Cloud Hosted, and self-managed Elasticsearch deployments.

input.description: Store text into the Elasticsearch index (index mode only).

Stores the documents into the vector database. The documents must be 
run through an embedding model prior to this step to compute the vectors. 
This node supports both storing documents and searching them - you can use 
the same Elasticsearch node for both upload and retrieve operations.

Searches the database for documents most similar to the given questions. 
This node supports both storing documents and searching them - you can use 
the same Elasticsearch node for both upload and retrieve operations.

output.description: Produces text that is most similar to the given question.
Produces documents that are most similar to the given question.

Produces an answer with the documents that are most similar 
to the given question.

Updates the question with documents most similar to the 
question and sets up a filter so piping this to another store 
driver will limit its answers to the given subset of documents.

fragment_size.description: Maximum characters in the returned highlight snippet (context window) per hit.
fragment_size.title: Snippet size (characters)

slop.description: The number of words to allow between terms when exact phrase search is enabled.
slop.title: Slop

search.description: Customize the search behavior of the index. This option does not affect the ingestion and creation of the index. You can switch between behaviors when searching between pipeline runs.
search.title: Customize Indexing Search Behavior

highlight.description: Use the unified highlighter to return snippets around matches.
highlight.title: Return contextual snippets

matchOperator.description:
Controls how multiple query terms are matched: 
'or' (default) matches documents containing ANY of the query terms, 
'and' matches documents containing ALL of the query terms, 
'exact' requires the exact phrase to appear in order (phrase matching).
matchOperator.title: Match Operator

host.description: Enter the server IP address e.g. Localhost
host.title: Host

index.description: Enter the name of the Elasticsearch index (must be lowercase)
index.title: Index Name / Collection Name

mode.description: Toggle between index (text search) and vector store (semantic search).
mode.title: Store Mode

ui:enumNames: Text Large   - A larger and more powerful model
Text Small   - A highly efficient model
Text Ada     - First OpenAI embeddings model
miniLM  - General use embeddings, good performance
